system_prompt:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

messages.content: {"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "dd15569a-7127-4e7f-b68a-894abd9c0fe8", "article_id": "71f092cf-6fe4-44ae-b5fa-d4a29a6d8ffb", "source_name": "Who What Wear", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "budget_shopping_guide", "brand": "Zara", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Here Are the On-Trend Items to Buy at Zara If You Have an $80 Budget", "finding the best on-trend items for $80 and under"], "anchor_json": {"author": "Audry Hiaoui", "publication": "Who What Wear", "publish_date": "2026-04-03", "article_url": "https://www.whowhatwear.com/fashion/shopping/zara-trends-spring-2026", "article_id": "71f092cf-6fe4-44ae-b5fa-d4a29a6d8ffb", "brand": "Zara"}}]}
